case_title: UT SAI LY VS. JOHN DOE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-08-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Ut Sai Ly, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. At the request of plaintiff in pro per, the Court ordered the case dismissed. Also at the request of plaintiff in pro per, and for good cause, the court ordered the $800.00 total sanctions imposed on the plaintiff for failure to appear at the Sep-18-2018 and the Dec-18-2018 OSC hearings are rescinded. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-05-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. ***NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance.*** Judge: CHARLES HAINES; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-18-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Aug-08-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
